title: ANOVA Hypothesis Testing Process
description: A flowchart illustrating the step-by-step process for conducting an ANOVA test to analyze differences between group means in a designed experiment, culminating in a decision for the semester-end examination.
elements: Determine Critical Value (F-critical from F-distribution table)
Make Decision: Reject H0 or Fail to Reject H0
relationships: Process flows sequentially from defining the hypothesis through calculation, comparison, and final decision-making
